description: §12.5 — a server function whose RETURN type is non-JSON-serializable (`snippet`) fires E-ROUTE-003 (error). The return value crosses the server→client network boundary as JSON; a snippet (parameterized markup) cannot be transmitted.
rationale: §12.5 wire-serializability gate (return direction): a `server function` return type resolving to a non-serializable kind cannot be JSON-encoded back to the client, so E-ROUTE-003 fires as a hard error (SPEC §12.5.3 reject, wired at the decl-site type pass).
